questions.question: Describe the key differences between supervised and unsupervised learning. How do these differences impact the use of deep learning in each approach?
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts and provide relevant examples

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a Markov decision process (MDP) and a Markov decision program (MDP)? Provide an example to illustrate this difference.
questions.hint: Focus on the definition and a simple example

questions.question: Explain how the concept of exploration-exploitation trade-off arises in reinforcement learning. What are some common techniques used to balance this trade-off?
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts and provide relevant examples
